description_long: This is a small, vintage-style single-propeller airplane with a teal fuselage and wings, accented by orange and white stripes and roundels. The registration number 'N-1320' is prominently displayed on the side of the fuselage and the tail fin, which features a tricolor pattern. The wings are straight and mounted at a low position on the fuselage, each adorned with a star insignia. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The cockpit is located near the front of the fuselage and appears to be a single-seat, enclosed design with a small canopy. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
description: A teal, vintage single-propeller airplane with orange and white accents, low-mounted straight wings, and a fixed tricycle landing gear. The cockpit is forward and enclosed, with a prominent registration number and star insignia.
description_view_0: Side view showing the teal fuselage, orange and white tail, registration number 'N-1320', and the single propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, forward cockpit, and the full wingspan with orange stripes and star insignia on each wing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same registration number, tail design, and the exposed landing gear beneath the fuselage.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the straight, low-mounted wings, the tricolor tail fin, and the overall symmetry of the airplane's design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; wings are rectangular and feature star insignia.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a small canopy.
